context: The official Agent Skills specification at [agentskills.io/specification](https://agentskills.io/specification) is concrete, authoritative, and sufficient to define macro/meso/micro architecture. "Subskill" is **not** an official term. Nested SKILL.md packages are neither supported nor demonstrated in canonical sources.[[anthropic.mintlify](https://anthropic.mintlify.app/en/docs/agents-and-tools/agent-skills/best-practices)]
